message:
feat(fcp-core): supply chain verification pipeline, policy preview API, and 500+ new tests

Add VerificationPipeline for supply chain attestation/SBOM policy gating with
deterministic evidence bundles. Add preview_policy_changes() for direct zone
policy comparison. Expand unit test coverage across 12 fcp-core modules:
supply_chain (+112), policy (+32), provisioning (+63), release (+66),
revocation (+85), secret (+40), zone_keys (+25), telemetry (+20),
connector (+11), object (+30), event (+22), ratelimit (expanded).
All 1,752 tests pass with 0 clippy warnings.

Closes beads: 1dh7 (Policy Preview Evaluator), 2ady (POL Tests).
Advances: 3rgx (SC Pipeline), 3p99 (TEST epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
